description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, glossy taupe leather or leather-like material. The sofa features two large, attached seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, both of which are uniform in size and shape. The armrests are straight, padded, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The legs are short, block-style, and appear to be made of dark wood or metal, positioned at the corners for stability. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, matching the rest of the upholstery. The overall design is sleek and minimal, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A sleek, taupe leather sofa with two large seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and short block legs. The design is modern and minimal, with a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and the sofa's glossy taupe upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's straight armrest, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the short block leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous backrest and the sofa's uniform upholstery with no visible seams or decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion thickness, with another short block leg visible at the corner.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and shape, with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, likely made of dark wood or metal, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid taupe color with a smooth, glossy leather finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
